name: atomic-habits
description: 詹姆斯·克利尔《原子习惯》的可执行工具箱：用四大定律让好习惯变容易、坏习惯变难
useCase: Developers and AI agents can use this skill to diagnose habit problems, design new habits from scratch, break bad habits, build systems, and shift identity from goal-focused to system-focused behavior change.
knownRisks: 习惯设计依赖用户诚实的环境评估
某些习惯（成瘾/心理依赖）可能需要专业干预
